name: Limbach Holdings, Inc.
summary: Part I Limbach Holdings, Inc. (the Company, we or our), a Delaware corporation headquartered in Warrendale, Pennsylvania, is a building systems solutions firm that designs, delivers, and maintains mechanical (heating, ventilation, and air conditioning), electrical, plumbing, and controls (MEPC) systems. The Company partners with building owners and operators of mission-critical facilities across healthcare, industrial and manufacturing, data centers, life sciences, higher education, and cultural...
